chunks.text: Course: EE 223 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 223. Stochastic Systems: Estimation and Control Catalog Description: Parameter and state estimation. System identification. Nonlinear filtering. Stochastic control. Adaptive control. Units: 3 Also Offered As: ELENG 223 Prerequisites: EL ENG 226A (which students are encouraged to take concurrently). Formats: Fall: 3 hours of lecture per week Spring: 3 hours of lecture per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: Yes Class Schedule (Spring 2026): EE 223 – MoWe 17:00-18:29, Cory 293 – Venkatachalam Anantharam Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
